section_title: Jurisdiction of Court in respect of matters covered by arbitration agreement.-
content:
7. Jurisdiction of Court in respect of matters covered by arbitration agreement.-
Notwithstanding anything contained in any other law for the time being in force, where
any of the parties to the arbitration agreement files a legal proceedings in a Court against
the other party, no judicial authority shall hear any legal proceedings except in so far as
provided by this Act.
Arbitration Act, 2001 Page 3
